fields.label: API Token
fields.helpText: From Cloudflare Dashboard -> My Profile -> API Tokens -> Create Token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API token via Cloudflare token verify endpoint

metadata.summary: Cloudflare CDN, DNS, Workers, and security services.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens
2. Click 'Create Token'
3. Choose a template or create a custom token with needed permissions
4. Click 'Continue to summary' then 'Create Token'
5. Copy the token value and paste it here
